dispositions.notes: Baseline only. Mobile Eats is product/substrate proof, not a formed portfolio company, and no close, pivot, or graduation disposition is claimed.

notes: This ledger keeps close, pivot, and graduate events separate from the standing holding-plane goal.
A disposition clears only with owner/operator, customer-obligation, financial, substrate-retention, and brand/public-update refs.
Graduation also requires graduation terms; pivot also requires pivot scope.
next_action: When a portfolio company closes, pivots, or graduates, add disposition receipts before marking the lifecycle event clear.
